protocol.title: Protocol Initialization
protocol.step_0_desc: Welcome to the unofficial, independent proving ground driven by the global basketball community. Everything here is verified by real fans. We don't represent any official authority; we represent the truth.
protocol.legal_disclaimer: This is an independent community project and is not affiliated with, authorized, or endorsed by LeBron James, the NBA, or any sports franchise.
protocol.step_1_desc: A King's monument, or a Fraud's grave. Every stat either crowns a legend or exposes a lie.
protocol.step_2_desc: One Person, One Device, One Vote. No bots, no fakes. Let the battle between GOAT and FRAUD be raw. Biases have nowhere to hide.
protocol.step_3_desc: This era-defining debate needs more eyes. Recruit your allies or your enemies. More witnesses, more authority.
protocol.step_4_desc: Glory or Collapse, it happens in a blink. When the court catches fire, your vote decides: Crown or Collapse.
